member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings
member.summary: JWT configuration bound from appsettings.json → JwtSettings section.

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings.SecretKey
member.summary: HMAC signing secret – must be at least 32 characters.

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings.Issuer
member.summary: Token issuer (iss claim).

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings.Audience
member.summary: Token audience (aud claim).

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings.ExpirationMinutes
member.summary: Access token lifetime in minutes. Default 480 = 8 hours.

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings.RefreshTokenExpirationDays
member.summary: Refresh token lifetime in days.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication endpoints: login, logout, forgot password. POST /api/auth/login – public POST /api/auth/logout – requires valid JWT

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a signed JWT access token.
member.remarks: Dummy credentials for local testing: admin@utconsole.com / Admin@2026! john.doe@utconsole.com / Service@2026! budi.santoso@utconsole.com / Mechanic@2026! manager.user@utconsole.com / Manager@2026!
member.returns: 200 OK with JWT on success; 401 on bad credentials; 400 on validation error.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logs out the current user and records the logout timestamp.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Initiates a password reset email flow. Always returns 200 to prevent user enumeration.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user account. Password is hashed server-side; never stored in plain text.
member.param: Registration details: username, email, password, optional profile fields.
member.returns: 201 Created with new user info on success; 409 Conflict if email/username taken; 400 on validation error.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.AuthController.Me
member.summary: Returns information about the currently authenticated user.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController
member.summary: CRUD endpoints for Cases. All endpoints require a valid JWT (Bearer token).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.GetCases(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of cases with optional filters.
member.param: Filter by status: Open, Assigned, InProgress, Resolved, Closed.
Filter by priority: Low, Medium, High, Critical.
Full-text search on case number, subject, and description.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.GetCase(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns full detail of a single case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.GetCaseDetail(System.String)
member.summary: Returns case detail with 3-column layout (FRD: Case Module Main Layout).
member.param: Case primary key or case number.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.ConvertToCaseDetailDto(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CaseDetailDto)
member.summary: Converts existing CaseDto to CaseDetailLayoutDto with 3-column layout data.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.GetDummyCaseDetail(System.String)
member.summary: Returns dummy data for case detail 3-column layout (FRD: Case Module Main Layout).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.CreateCase(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CreateCaseRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new case. Assigns auto-generated case number.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.UpdateCase(System.Int32,UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.UpdateCaseRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing case's fields.
member.param: Fields to update (null fields are ignored).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.CasesController.DeleteCase(System.Int32)
member.summary: Permanently deletes a case (Admin role required).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.SearchController
member.summary: Search endpoints for Account, Contact, and Asset entities. Used by Create Case form for autocomplete/searchable select fields.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.SearchController.SearchAccounts(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search Accounts by name, ID, or other indexed fields.
member.returns: List of matching Accounts with metadata

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.SearchController.SearchContacts(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search Contacts by name, email, phone, or Contact ID. Optionally filter by Account ID.
member.param: Optional Account ID to filter by

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.SearchController.SearchAssets(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search Assets by name, Asset ID, serial number, or type. Optionally filter by Account ID.
member.param: Optional Account ID to filter by

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController
member.summary: CRUD endpoints for Work Orders. All endpoints require a valid JWT (Bearer token).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.GetWorkOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of work orders with optional filters.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.GetByCaseId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns all work orders for a specific case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.GetWorkOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns full details of a single work order.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.CreateWorkOrder(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.CreateWorkOrderRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new work order linked to an existing case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.UpdateWorkOrder(System.Int32,UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.UpdateWorkOrderRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing work order (status, mechanic, scores, etc.).
member.param: Fields to update (null fields are ignored).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Controllers.WorkOrdersController.DeleteWorkOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Permanently deletes a work order (Admin role required).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Data.ApplicationDbContext
member.summary: Main EF Core DbContext for UT Service Console. Contains all 14 entity DbSets with relationship configuration and seed data.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Data.DesignTimeDbContextFactory
member.summary: Design-time factory used by EF Core CLI tools (dotnet ef migrations add / update). Uses SQLite with a local .db file — no database server required.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.DTOs.CaseDetailLayoutDto
member.summary: DTO for Case Detail View - 3-Column Layout Based on FRD: 1.1 FRD Case Module Main Layout

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Middleware.JwtMiddleware
member.summary: Validates the JWT Bearer token on every request that carries one. Invalid tokens are rejected with 401 before reaching any controller. Endpoints decorated with [AllowAnonymous] bypass this check via the built-in ASP.NET Core authentication middleware (this middleware runs in addition to it to provide detailed logging).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Middleware.JwtMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Intercepts each request, extracts and validates the Bearer token if present.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest
member.summary: Request payload for POST /api/auth/login.

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest.Email
member.summary: Email address or username of the user.

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest.Password
member.summary: Plain-text password (never stored/logged).

member.name: P:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest.RememberMe
member.summary: When true, extends session duration.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginResponse
member.summary: Response payload returned on successful login.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.UserDto
member.summary: Safe user info embedded in LoginResponse (no sensitive fields).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest
member.summary: Request payload for POST /api/auth/register.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterResponse
member.summary: Response payload for POST /api/auth/register.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CaseDto
member.summary: Summary DTO for Case list views.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CaseDetailDto
member.summary: Full detail DTO for Case detail page (FRD 1.4.1 - 9 sections).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CreateCaseRequest
member.summary: Request payload to create a new Case (FRD 1.4.1 - 9 sections).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.UpdateCaseRequest
member.summary: Request payload to update an existing Case.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Common.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Generic API envelope for all responses.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Common.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Paginated list wrapper.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.WorkOrderDto
member.summary: Summary DTO for WorkOrder list views.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.WorkOrderDetailDto
member.summary: Full detail DTO for WorkOrder detail page.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.CreateWorkOrderRequest
member.summary: Request payload to create a new WorkOrder.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.UpdateWorkOrderRequest
member.summary: Request payload to update an existing WorkOrder.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Account
member.summary: Customer account / company record.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Asset
member.summary: Equipment / machinery asset record.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.AuditLog
member.summary: Immutable audit trail for all entity changes.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Case
member.summary: Service case / ticket record.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.CaseNote
member.summary: Note / comment attached to a Case.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Contact
member.summary: Contact person linked to an Account.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.LoginHistory
member.summary: Login/logout audit history per user.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Permission
member.summary: Granular permission for RBAC.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.Role
member.summary: Application role for RBAC.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.RolePermission
member.summary: Join table for Role ↔ Permission many-to-many relationship.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.SLA
member.summary: Service Level Agreement tracking record linked to a Case.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.User
member.summary: System user with authentication, roles, and audit tracking.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.WorkOrder
member.summary: Work order linked to a case; assigned to a mechanic for execution.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.Entities.WorkOrderNote
member.summary: Note / comment attached to a WorkOrder.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService
member.summary: Handles user authentication: credential validation, account lockout (5 attempts / 30 min), JWT generation (8-hour expiry), and login history recording. Passwords are never logged at any level.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService.LoginAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates email/password, enforces lockout policy, and returns a signed JWT on success.
member.returns: with JWT on success or error details on failure.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService.LogoutAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Records the logout event (token blacklist deferred to Phase 2).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService.ForgotPasswordAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Initiates forgot-password flow. Returns true even if email is not found to prevent user enumeration attacks.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService.ResetPasswordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resets user password after validating reset token.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.AuthService.RegisterAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user: validates uniqueness, enforces password strength, hashes password with salt, and persists the user to the database.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService
member.summary: Business logic for Case CRUD operations, case number generation, and status transitions.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.GetCasesAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a paginated, filterable list of cases.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.GetCaseByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns full case details including related entities.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.CreateCaseAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.CreateCaseRequest,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new case with auto-generated case number and dynamic SLA calculation.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.CalculateSla(System.DateTime,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Calculates SLA response and resolution targets based on FRD SLA matrix.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.UpdateCaseAsync(System.Int32,UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Cases.UpdateCaseRequest,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates mutable fields of an existing case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.CaseService.DeleteCaseAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a case (sets status to Closed) — hard delete not permitted in MVP.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService
member.summary: Contract for the authentication and session management service.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService.LoginAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates credentials and returns a JWT token on success.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService.LogoutAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Records logout event (token revocation handled client-side for MVP).

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService.ForgotPasswordAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a password reset link to the given email address.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService.ResetPasswordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resets password with a valid reset token.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IAuthService.RegisterAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user, hashes the password, and persists to DB.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.ICaseService
member.summary: Contract for Case management business logic.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.Interfaces.IWorkOrderService
member.summary: Contract for Work Order management business logic.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService
member.summary: Business logic for Work Order CRUD, WO number generation, and status transitions.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.GetWorkOrdersAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a paginated, filterable list of work orders.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.GetWorkOrdersByCaseAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns all work orders belonging to a specific case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.GetWorkOrderByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns full work order details including related entities.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.CreateWorkOrderAsync(UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.CreateWorkOrderRequest,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new work order linked to an existing case.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.UpdateWorkOrderAsync(System.Int32,UT.ServiceConsole.API.Models.DTOs.WorkOrders.UpdateWorkOrderRequest,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates mutable fields of an existing work order.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Services.WorkOrderService.DeleteWorkOrderAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a work order (Admin only in controllers).

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.JwtTokenGenerator
member.summary: Generates and validates JWT access tokens and opaque refresh tokens.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.JwtTokenGenerator.GenerateToken(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,UT.ServiceConsole.API.Configurations.JwtSettings)
member.summary: Creates a signed JWT containing UserID, Email, Username, and Role claims. Token expiration is driven by (default 480 = 8 h).
member.param: Database primary key of the authenticated user.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.JwtTokenGenerator.GenerateRefreshToken
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically secure 64-byte opaque refresh token.

member.name: T:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.PasswordHasher
member.summary: Provides SHA-256 password hashing with a per-password salt and password-strength validation following security best practices. Passwords are NEVER logged or returned in any response.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.PasswordHasher.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a plain-text password using SHA-256 with a random salt. Format stored: base64(salt):base64(hash)
member.returns: Salted hash string safe for database storage.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.PasswordHasher.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a plain-text password against a stored salted hash.
member.returns: true if password matches; otherwise false.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.PasswordHasher.ValidateStrength(System.String)
member.summary: Validates password strength: min 8 chars, uppercase, digit, special character.

member.name: M:UT.ServiceConsole.API.Utilities.PasswordHasher.CryptographicEquals(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.
